Based on the zoomed view of atom C:10, I can identify the following covalently connected neighbor atoms:

**Neighbor atoms of C:10:**
1. **C:7** (Carbon) - connected on the left side
2. **C:11** (Carbon) - connected on the right side
3. **H:33** (Hydrogen) - connected on top
4. **H** (Hydrogen) - connected behind C:10 (index partially obscured in this view)

**geomconf_index:** 2129

The carbon atom C:10 has a tetrahedral geometry with 4 covalent bonds: 2 to other carbon atoms (C:7 and C:11) and 2 to hydrogen atoms (H:33 and one more H).

question: Please find neighbour atoms of atom index 10 (element: C). Neighbour atoms are covalently connected. Report their atomic indices and elements. Also return the geomconf_index.
